name: QuotaManager

neutralConcepts: T187 is an INLINE SERVICE — no factory ID. F426 does NOT exist.
T187 instantiated directly in T173 QueryExecutionEngine constructor
quota check runs BEFORE warehouse read (T173 gate layer 1)
recordUsage() called AFTER successful query execution only

ironRules.rule: T187 is an INLINE SERVICE — no factory ID. F426 does NOT exist. Never @Inject() T187. Injecting T187 as a factory is a BUILD_FAILURE.
T187 QuotaManager must be instantiated directly in T173 QueryExecutionEngine constructor — not via DI, not via factory.
quota check must run BEFORE warehouse read (T173 gate layer 1). Quota check after warehouse read defeats the purpose of quota enforcement.
recordUsage() called AFTER successful query execution only. Do not record usage for failed or quota-denied queries.

keywords: quota manager inline service no factory injection F426 does not exist T173 constructor gate layer 1 record usage warehouse analytics
